e2e.note: client/e2e/flows/90-phone-responsive.spec.ts under the new mobile-chromium (Pixel 5) project; tablet/desktop spec 80 (17/17) re-run green under chromium as up-band non-regression.

behaviors.behavior: useIsPhoneViewport ≤767 reactive, SSR-safe, distinct from compact

behaviors.evidence: TerminalKeyBar.test.tsx (null on fine / bar on coarse)

behaviors.behavior: Phone sidebar = overlay drawer; inline sidebar absent <768
Drawer opens on hamburger; closes on Escape + nav-tap; nav navigates
Drawer shows full labels (not the rail) even when compact (H2)
Up-band guard: ≥768 inline sidebar, no drawer/top-bar (L3)
Key bar renders on coarse / null on fine; all keys present
Key-bar buttons preventDefault (no focus steal); ⌨ focuses term
Key bar writes mapped byte to pty (writer); reader disabled, no write (H4)
behaviors.evidence: composition: terminalKeySequence unit (id→byte CSI/SS3) + TerminalKeyBar.test (reader→disabled, no onKey) + EmbeddedTerminal.test onData→socket.send (writer-frame path) + e2e 90 (bar enabled on touch). EmbeddedTerminal onKey re-checks role===writer (mirrors useAutoLaunch).

behaviors.behavior: Terminal subtree never unmounts (key bar sibling of persistent canvas, rule 21)
List: Phase column hidden <md, shown ≥md; no page overflow at 393
Projects table scrolls in-card; no page overflow at 393
Modal fits 393px viewport; footer wraps; primary 44px on touch
behaviors.evidence: e2e 90 (wizard width ≤ vw, no overflow) + modal unit suites (41)
e2e 90 P3 computed min-height ≥ 44; key/hamburger h-11

behaviors.behavior: viewport-fit=cover + interactive-widget=resizes-content; dvh shell; safe-area pads (notch/keyboard visual effect)
useIsCompactViewport public behavior unchanged after shared-useMediaQuery refactor
behaviors.evidence: useIsCompactViewport.test.ts compact block + SidebarNav rail tests + spec 80
